relationships.evidence: Our experiments are conducted on two multi-task medical datasets MMCU-Medical (Zeng, 2023) and CMB-Exam (Wang et al., 2023b), and one open-domain Q&A medical dataset CMB-Clin (Wang et al., 2023b). (Section 6.1)
